MissionReward.name: Mission Reward
MissionReward.help: Claim daily and weekly mission rewards from the mission popup.

Mail.name: Expiring Mail
Mail.help: Sort the mailbox by displayed remaining time and collect mails showing 1 hour or 1 day left. Because the game rounds the display down to whole hours or days, this is effectively about 2 real hours or 2 real days before expiration.

CommunityAio.name: Community AIO
CommunityAio.help: Run the community API script (check-in, tasks, exchange) with local credentials.

SanctuaryDaily.name: Sanctuary Daily
SanctuaryDaily.help: Sanctuary daily module with independent scheduler.

Knights.name: Guild
Knights.help: Guild automation: sign-in reward, support, expedition flow, and World Boss.

Arena.name: Arena
Arena.help: Enter arena and handle entry reward branch.

Store.name: Store
Store.help: Buy daily and weekly items from the in-game store.

PetsGift.name: Pet Gift
PetsGift.help: Collect the pet gift from the menu. After a successful claim, schedule around every 22 hours; when not ready, fall back to the recorded claim time or server update.

Combat.name: Daily Combat
Combat.help: Daily combat task. Runs the selected stage as a daily task and delays to the next server reset after completion. Use Repeat Farming for long-running farming.

CombatFarm.name: Repeat Farming
CombatFarm.help: Repeat farming task separated from daily combat. Use it for Hunt, Spirit Altar, Saint 3-7, and other stages that should keep farming instead of waiting for the next server reset.

CommunityAuth.name: Community Login
CommunityAuth.help: Open the Electron community login window and refresh the CK used by Community AIO.

SanctuaryMonthly.name: Sanctuary Monthly
SanctuaryMonthly.help: Sanctuary monthly module with independent scheduler.

NextRun.name: Next Run
NextRun.help:
Updated automatically after completing the task to set next scheduled run, typically not manually modified
However you can force immediate scheduling if you clear this text field

ServerUpdate.name: Server Update
ServerUpdate.help: Series of server refresh time(s) as to when this task will next run, this is automatically converted to respective time zone, generally do not need to modify

Serial.name: Serial
Serial.help:
Common emulator Serial can be queried in the list below
Use "auto" to auto-detect emulators, but if multiple emulators are running or use emulators that do not support auto-detect, "auto" cannot be used and serial must be filled in manually
Default serial for select emulators:
- BlueStacks 127.0.0.1:5555
- BlueStacks4 Hyper-V use "bluestacks4-hyperv", "bluestacks4-hyperv-2" for multi instance, and so on
- BlueStacks5 Hyper-V use "bluestacks5-hyperv", "bluestacks5-hyperv-1" for multi instance, and so on
- NoxPlayer 127.0.0.1:62001
- NoxPlayer64bit 127.0.0.1:59865
- MuMuPlayer/MuMuPlayer X 127.0.0.1:7555
- MuMuPlayer12 127.0.0.1:16384
- MemuPlayer 127.0.0.1:21503
- LDPlayer emulator-5554 or 127.0.0.1:5555
- WSA use "wsa-0" to make the game run in the background, which needs to be controlled or closed by third-party software
If there are multiple emulator instances running, the default is reserved for one of them and the others will use different serials to avoid conflicts
Open console.bat and run `adb devices` to find them or follow the emulator's official tutorial

GameClient.name: Game Client
GameClient.help: When using cloud, you will be automatically queued to log in. Cloud game is available in CN only

PackageName.name: Game Server
PackageName.help: Can't distinguish different regions of oversea servers, please select the server manually.

GameLanguage.name: In-game Text Language
GameLanguage.help: Currently, only Simplified Chinese and English are supported. Please set the text language in game to one of them.

ScreenshotMethod.name: Screenshot Method
ScreenshotMethod.help:
When using auto-select, a benchmark will be performed and automatically changed to the fastest screenshot method.
General speed: DroidCast_raw >> aScreenCap_nc > ADB_nc >>> aScreenCap > uiautomator2 ~= ADB.
Run Tools - Performance Test to find the fastest method.

ControlMethod.name: Control Method
ControlMethod.help:
Speed: MaaTouch = minitouch >>> uiautomator2 ~= ADB
MaaTouch is recommended

AdbRestart.name: Try to restart adb when no device found

_info.name: Emulator Settings
_info.help: The following values are auto-filled according to "Serial", if you don’t understand, please don't modify them

SaveError.name: Record Exception
SaveError.help: Records exception and log into directory for review or sharing

ScreenshotLength.name: Record Screenshot(s)
ScreenshotLength.help: Number of screenshots saved when exception occurs

OnePushConfig.name: Error notify config
OnePushConfig.help:
When AES cannot handle exception, send a message through Onepush. Configuration document: 
https://github.com/LmeSzinc/AzurLaneAutoScript/wiki/Onepush-configuration-%5BEN%5D

ScreenshotInterval.name: Take Screenshots Every X Second(s)
ScreenshotInterval.help: Minimum interval between 2 screenshots, limited in 0.1 ~ 0.3, can help reduce CPU on high-end PCs

CombatScreenshotInterval.name: Take Screenshots Every X Second(s) In Combat
CombatScreenshotInterval.help: Minimum interval between 2 screenshots, limited in 0.1 ~ 1.0, can help reduce CPU during battle

WhenTaskQueueEmpty.name: When Task Queue is Empty
WhenTaskQueueEmpty.help: Close AL when there are no pending tasks, can help reduce CPU

_info.name: Mission Reward Settings
_info.help: Choose which mission reward tabs should be claimed.

ClaimDailyRewards.name: Claim Daily Rewards
ClaimDailyRewards.help: Claim the daily mission reward chest when available.

_info.name: Expiring Mail Settings
_info.help: Sort the mailbox by displayed remaining time and collect mails close to expiration. The game rounds the display down to whole hours or days, so the 1-hour and 1-day thresholds are effectively about 2 real hours and 2 real days.

CollectWithin.name: Collect Mails Showing Within
CollectWithin.help: This threshold uses the remaining time shown in game. '1 Hour' is effectively about 2 real hours, and '1 Day' about 2 real days before expiration.

CredentialsFile.name: Credentials File Path
CredentialsFile.help: Optional. Absolute path to Electron-exported e7-credentials.json; leave empty to use default path.

_info.name: Community Login
_info.help: Manage local credentials for the CN community protocol task. Start opens the login window and waits for credentials in the log.

CredentialsFile.name: Credentials file
CredentialsFile.help: Leave empty to use the default credentials path shared by Electron and Community AIO.

WaitTimeout.name: Maximum login wait seconds
WaitTimeout.help: After Start, the tool polls the credentials file in the log area and exits if no valid CK is captured in time.

_info.name: Guild Settings
_info.help: Toggle guild sub-features and configure behavior.

ClaimSigninRateReward.name: Claim Sign-in Reward
ClaimSigninRateReward.help: Automatically claim sign-in rate reward on guild home.

Support.name: Guild Support
Support.help: Enter guild support and run donation/request flows.

SupportLowerLevelFairyFlower.name: Donate Lower-Level Fairy Flower
SupportLowerLevelFairyFlower.help: Donate Lower-Level Fairy Flower to guild requests in support.

SupportBeginnerPenguin.name: Donate Beginner Penguin
SupportBeginnerPenguin.help: Donate Beginner Penguin to guild requests in support.

RequestItem.name: Support Request Item
RequestItem.help: Select one item to request in guild support.

WeeklyTask.name: Guild Weekly Rewards
WeeklyTask.help: Enter guild weekly page and claim available weekly task rewards and points rewards.

WorldBoss.name: World Boss
WorldBoss.help: Run World Boss base flow and return when attempts are exhausted.

TeamBattle.name: Read Remaining Guild War Attacks
TeamBattle.help: Enter guild war, clear settlement popups, and read the current attack count.

Reminder.name: Enable Guild War Reminder
Reminder.help: During active guild war, send a notification reminder if unused attacks still remain near the end time.

ReminderLeadMinutes.name: Reminder Lead Time
ReminderLeadMinutes.help: How many minutes before guild war ends to start checking for unused attacks.

ReminderLastEnd.name: Last Guild War Reminder End
ReminderLastEnd.help: Internal deduplication state for guild war reminders.

ClaimWeeklyRewards.name: Claim Weekly Rewards
ClaimWeeklyRewards.help: Automatically claim weekly rewards when the popup appears during arena entry.

ClaimWeeklyBattleRewards.name: Claim Weekly Battle Rewards
ClaimWeeklyBattleRewards.help: After NPC arena farming, claim weekly battle rewards before leaving arena.

ClaimBattlePassRewards.name: Read Battle Pass Level and Claim Rewards
ClaimBattlePassRewards.help: Automatically read the battle pass level and claim rewards.

NPCCombat.name: Farm NPC
NPCCombat.help: Enable automatic NPC battles in arena.

NPCCombatFastBattle.name: Use Fast Battle
NPCCombatFastBattle.help: Prefer fast battle mode for NPC fights.

NPCCombatCount.name: NPC Battle Count
NPCCombatCount.help: Maximum number of NPC battles in this run.

_info.name: Store Daily Purchases
_info.help: Use checkboxes for one-time buys and dropdowns for limited-count items.

BuyDailyFreeItem.name: Buy Daily Free Item
BuyDailyFreeItem.help: Buy the daily free item in the Recommended store.

BuyFriendshipMobility40.name: Buy 40 Energy (Friendship)
BuyFriendshipMobility40.help: Buy the 40 Energy item in the Friendship Points store.

BuyFriendshipArenaFlag.name: Buy Arena Flag (Friendship)
BuyFriendshipArenaFlag.help: Buy Arena Flag in the Friendship Points store.

BuyConquestMobility40.name: 40 Energy Count (Conquest)
BuyConquestMobility40.help: How many 40 Energy items to buy in the Conquest store. Max 3.

_info.name: Store Weekly Purchases
_info.help: Use checkboxes for one-time buys and dropdowns for limited-count items.

BuyConquestMorogora.name: Buy Morogora (Conquest)
BuyConquestMorogora.help: Buy weekly-limited Morogora in the Conquest Points store.

BuyFriendshipArtifactEnhancementStone.name: Artifact Enhancement Stone Count (Friendship)
BuyFriendshipArtifactEnhancementStone.help: How many Artifact Enhancement Stones to buy in the Friendship Points store. Max 3.

BuyInheritanceMorogora.name: Morogora Count (Inheritance)
BuyInheritanceMorogora.help: How many Morogora to buy in the Inheritance store. Max 2.

BuyInheritancePotentialFragments.name: Potential Fragments Count
BuyInheritancePotentialFragments.help: How many Potential Fragments to buy in the Inheritance store. Max 2.

_info.name: Pet Gift Settings
_info.help: Internal scheduling state. Normally this does not need manual changes.

LastClaimAt.name: Last Claim Time
LastClaimAt.help: Used to estimate when the next pet gift should become available.

_info.name: Combat Settings
_info.help: Configure combat domain, element, grade, and run counts.

Mode.name: Mode
Mode.help: Choose between fixed-count task mode and long-running event mode.

Domain.name: Domain
Domain.help: Choose whether this task farms Hunt or Spirit Altar.

Element.name: Element
Element.help: Choose the element branch to enter.

AltarGrade.name: Altar Grade
AltarGrade.help: Difficulty used for Spirit Altar runs.

FastCombat.name: Use Fast Combat
FastCombat.help: Enable fast combat when available. If disabled, the task uses repeat combat and minimizes it to the main page.

RepeatCombatCount.name: Repeat Combat Count
RepeatCombatCount.help: Target repeat combat count for pet repeat battle.

_info.name: Combat Runtime
_info.help: Internal combat task state used for resume and runtime sync.

Session.name: Runtime Session
Session.help: Internal session marker. Manual edits are not recommended.

CollectGoldenInheritance.name: Collect Golden Inheritance
CollectGoldenInheritance.help: After summoning, click to collect when Golden Inheritance is full.

Toast.DisableTranslateMode: Click here to disable translate mode
Toast.ClickToUpdate: New update available, click here to update

AddAlas.FileExist: A config with the same name exists, please choose another one
AddAlas.InvalidChar: Config name cannot contain any of the following characters: .\/:*?"<>|

Update.UpdateWait: Waiting for all AES complete current task
Update.UpdateFailed: Update failed. Logs can be found in ./log/*_gui.txt
Update.Author: Author
Update.DisabledWarn: Updater module is disabled. You need to manually restart AES to update

Remote.NotRunning: Not running, server disconnected or offline
Remote.NotEnable: Disabled, set webui password in deploy.yaml and enable remote access
Remote.SSHNotInstall: No SSH command in your system. Please refer to the tutorial to download or install one

Text.CommunityAuthCredentialsHelp: Check current CK status and open the Electron login window to refresh local credentials.
Text.CommunityAioTodo: Community AIO is available only in CN config (cn).
